title: SDM Shipping Box
description: SDM Shipping Box is an auto-selling block (5 tiers: Wood→Iron→Gold→Diamond→Netherite) that converts configured items to SDM (Property Points) at fixed intervals. Higher tiers = shorter intervals & larger (even unlimited for Netherite) batch capacity. Price
body:
The SDM Shipping Box is an auto-selling block that converts eligible items into SDM (Property Points). Once valid materials (configured in the trade list) are placed inside, it automatically settles earnings at fixed intervals—no manual trading required. It comes in 5 tiers (Wood → Iron → Gold → Diamond → Netherite); higher tiers mean shorter intervals and larger single-batch processing capacities.
 
 
Wooden SDM Shipping Box: Basic tier, ideal for early-game.
Iron SDM Shipping Box: Balanced interval & batch size.
Golden SDM Shipping Box: Faster intervals + larger single-batch capacity.
Diamond SDM Shipping Box: High-frequency intervals + large batch size.
Netherite SDM Shipping Box: Fastest intervals + unlimited single-batch capacity.
Pricing Notes
Prices are affected by multipliers, random fluctuations, supply-demand (over-selling the same item lowers its price), batch/type bonuses, and handling fees. Final earnings are subject to actual shipping—estimated earnings appear in the item tooltip.
How to Obtain
Wooden SDM Shipping Box: Crafting Table → 8 Oak Planks + 1 Chest
Iron SDM Shipping Box: Crafting Table → 8 Iron Ingots + 1 Wooden SDM Shipping Box
Golden SDM Shipping Box: Crafting Table → 8 Gold Ingots + 1 Iron SDM Shipping Box
Diamond SDM Shipping Box: Crafting Table → 8 Diamonds + 1 Golden SDM Shipping Box
Netherite SDM Shipping Box: Smithing Table → Netherite Upgrade Template + 1 Diamond SDM Shipping Box + 1 Netherite Ingot
How to Use
Place the box on the ground, right-click to open its interface.
Insert eligible items (configured in the trade list) into the left slots.
The box auto-converts items to SDM at its tier’s interval. Check the right panel for the next shipping time.
Trade Configuration (Admins/Server Owners)
Open Config UI: Use the command /xiangcaomengjia config (requires OP permissions) to access the trade configuration interface.


Reload Trades: Click "Reload" in the config UI, or use /xiangcaomengjia reload to refresh trades.json (no game restart needed).

Refresh Price Multipliers: Use /xiangcaomengjia refreshPrice (if price fluctuation is enabled) to update current world price multipliers.
In the config UI, you can add/edit/delete trades: select an item, set its quantity & base price, then save to trades.json.
Dependencies
Requires sdmshop


出货箱是一个基于 SDM（财产点数）的自动出售方块。放入符合配置的物资后，会按设定周期自动结算为财产点数，无需手动交易。共有五种材质：木、铁、金、钻石、下界合金，材质越高档，出货间隔越短、单次处理数量越大。
![出货箱](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4e579650cd3cb3a0e9477250d7922c8c3dba758.png)
- **木出货箱**：最基础，适合前期。
- **铁出货箱**：速度与容量适中。
- **金出货箱**：更快，单次可处理更多。
- **钻石出货箱**：高频率、大单次处理量。
- **下界合金出货箱**：最快，单次处理无上限。 
- 

价格会受倍率、随机波动、供需（同种卖多会跌）、批量与种类加成、手续费等影响，具体以实际出货为准；物品提示中会显示预估出售所得。

### 获取方式

- **木出货箱**：工作台，8 个橡木木板 + 1 个箱子。
- **铁出货箱**：工作台，8 个铁锭 + 1 个木出货箱。
- **金出货箱**：工作台，8 个金锭 + 1 个铁出货箱。
- **钻石出货箱**：工作台，8 个钻石 + 1 个金出货箱。
- **下界合金出货箱**：锻造台，下界合金升级模板 + 钻石出货箱 + 下界合金锭。

### 使用方法

1. 将出货箱放置在地上，右键打开界面。
2. 在左侧格子放入要出售的物品（需在交易列表中已配置）。
3. 出货箱会按自身材质对应的间隔自动将物品按配置价格折算为财产点数；右侧可查看下次出货时间等。

### 配置交易（管理员/服主）

- **打开配置界面**：在游戏中输入命令 **`/xiangcaomengjia config`**（需 OP 权限），即可打开出货箱交易配置界面。
- ![配置界面](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/294d7b9a95350425c3860e2241f1f586f784eff5.png)
- **重载交易**：在配置界面点击「重载」按钮，或输入 **`/xiangcaomengjia reload`**，可重新加载 `trades.json`，无需重启游戏。
- **刷新价格倍率**（若开启价格变动）：**`/xiangcaomengjia refreshPrice`**，手动刷新当前世界的价格倍率。

在配置界面中可**添加 / 编辑 / 删除**交易：选择物品、设置数量与基础价格，保存到 `trades.json`。

### 依赖说明

- 本 Mod 依赖sdmshop
